mapper.select: SELECT /*fqcMapper.getFqcPlcyBasList */ FQC_PLCY_CD , FQC_PLCY_NM , FQC_PLCY_DESC , FQC_TRGT_CUST , FQC_PLAN_INCL_YN , STRT_DTTM FROM MCP_FQC_PLCY_BAS WHERE 1=1 AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN STRT_DTTM AND END_DTTM AND STATE_CODE = 'A' ORDER BY FQC_TRGT_CUST DESC , FQC_PLAN_INCL_YN DESC

SELECT /*fqcMapper.getFqcPlcyBasList */ FQC_PLCY_CD , FQC_PLCY_NM , FQC_PLCY_DESC , FQC_TRGT_CUST , FQC_PLAN_INCL_YN , STRT_DTTM FROM MCP_FQC_PLCY_BAS WHERE 1=1 AND FQC_PLCY_CD = #{fqcPlcyCd} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN STRT_DTTM AND END_DTTM AND STATE_CODE = 'A'

SELECT FQC_SEQ , T1.FQC_PLCY_CD , USER_ID , BNF_CD , FQC_DESC , SYS_RDATE_DD , T1.STRT_DTTM , T1.END_DTTM , T1.RVISN_DTTM FROM MCP_FQC_BAS T1 , MCP_FQC_PLCY_BAS T2 WHERE 1=1 AND T1.FQC_PLCY_CD = T2.FQC_PLCY_CD AND T1.END_DTTM > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND STATE_CODE = 'A' AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE MCP_FQC_BAS SET RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE --수정일시 , RVISN_ID = #{regstId} --수정자 ID
, BNF_CD = #{bnfCd} --혜택코드
, FQC_DESC = #{fqcDesc} --설명
, END_DTTM = #{endDttm} --종료일
WHERE FQC_SEQ = #{fqcSeq}

UPDATE MCP_FQC_DLT SET RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE --수정일시 , RVISN_ID = #{regstId} --수정자 ID
, STATE_CODE = #{stateCode} --상태값
, CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} --계약번호
, UET_SEQ = #{uetSeq} --이벤트 공유 키값
, COMMEND_ID = #{commendId} --추천인 아이디
, MRK_STRT_DTTM = #{mrkStrtDttm} --약관동의날짜
, RE_CONTRACT_NUM = #{reContractNum} --피추천인 계약번호
, REVIEW_ID = #{reviewId} --사용후기 일련번호
, DTL_DESC = #{dtlDesc} --설명
, INTERNET_ID = #{internetId} --kt internet id
, END_DTTM = #{upEndDttm} --종료일
, SYS_RDATE_DD = #{sysRdateDd} --등록일 YYYYMMDD
, FQC_PLCY_MSN_CD = #{fqcPlcyMsnCdUp}
WHERE 1=1 AND FQC_SEQ = #{fqcSeq} AND END_DTTM = #{endDttm}
AND FQC_PLCY_MSN_CD = #{fqcPlcyMsnCd}
mapper.select: SELECT FQC_PLCY_CD , MSN_CNT , BNF_CD , BNF_LVL FROM MCP_FQC_PLCY_BNF WHERE 1=1 AND FQC_PLCY_CD = #{fqcPlcyCd}
